title: lysimachia remota var. remota
intro: Lysimachia remota var. remota, also known as Chinese fir-leaved loosestrife, is a plant species belonging to the Primulaceae family. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antipyretic, and antibacterial effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating pain and swelling, and treating respiratory infections. In herbal preparations, Lysimachia remota var. remota is often used in decoctions, infusions, or tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
